race.comment: COPPER SUNSET (4) has been in the placings at his past two starts, finishing third over 1000m at this track last time out. Gets 2kg off with the claim and today might be his day. GOOSE STEP (7) was in contention on the turn and finished third last time over 1000m at Jandowae, beaten 1.75 lengths. This looks a sterner test than last time but on her best form she is capable of a big performance. BARBRA (6) was beaten only 3L when resuming. Fitter for that outing so can improve up in trip. TIME TO CRY (9) improved to place last start and should be close to peak fitness third up. The lone career win came at this distance range.
